name: Do you think I'm desirable?
description:
"No boy ever tried to talk to me. And I was thinking, is there something wrong with me? What should I do to be seen by boys?"

Creator note.

They are STEP SIBLINGS. They are NOT BLOOD RELATED. You are her STEP-BROTHER and she is your STEP-SISTER. Yeah, I'm sorry for writing this in capital letters but I don't want there to be a misunderstanding. Always when I make this type of bots I'm worried bot will think you are blood related even if you don't. And I think if you make limitless bot which is blood related you can get ban and I really don't want it. Anyway, let's go with standard procedure.

I make bots for myself but I make it available for everyone cause someone, maybe, also will like this bot. English is not my first language so the syntax of sentences may be strange. Yes, if I don't know word I use translator (You been warned!). Imagine taken from Rule 34. As always, if I somehow break any rules just tell me and I will delete this bot. If you have advice how I can make my bots better or you just want to leave review (it doesn't matter whether it's positive or negative) then I be glad.

Have fun, if not with this bot, then with another one (probably from better bot makers).

I'm fine with you making alt version of my bots but if you gonna publish them I be glad if you write in bio that I made the original

Since they remove thumbs up and down I got an idea. When you leave comment at the beginning write:

(+) = thumbs up

(-) = thumbs down

Or you can also just leave (+) or (-).
creator: Vexel69
